category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to the United Arab Emirates.

target_market_label.en: United Arab Emirates (ESMA / DEWA EV Green Charger)
target_market_label.zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国（ESMA / DEWA EV Green Charger）
target_market_label.zht: 阿拉伯聯合酋長國（ESMA / DEWA EV Green Charger）

title.en: China-to-UAE EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against UAE conformity assessment, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, DEWA EV Green Charger and grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与阿联酋合格评定、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、DEWA EV Green Charger及并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與阿聯酋合格評定、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、DEWA EV Green Charger及併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ESMA or MoIAT scope determination, DEWA approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current UAE conformity assessment rules, emirate-level utility requirements, DEWA EV Green Charger requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ESMA或MoIAT适用范围裁定、DEWA批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿联酋合格评定规则、各酋长国公用事业要求、DEWA EV Green Charger要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ESMA或MoIAT適用範圍裁定、DEWA批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋合格評定規則、各酋長國公用事業要求、DEWA EV Green Charger要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering the UAE, the confirmed practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 where required by the intended network, DEWA or local utility grid-connection acceptance, and OCPP back-office interoperability for networked chargers. A blanket UAE whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-13, so exporters should treat MoIAT / ESMA conformity assessment as scope-dependent and verify the exact HS code, electrical-product category, and emirate-level project approval route.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入阿联酋时，已确认的实务差距包括IEC体系安全及EMC证据、在目标网络要求时从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口、DEWA或当地公用事业并网验收，以及联网充电桩的OCPP后台互操作。截至2026年6月13日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的阿联酋强制认证规则，因此出口商应将MoIAT / ESMA合格评定视为取决于适用范围，并核验具体HS编码、电气产品类别和各酋长国项目审批路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入阿聯酋時，已確認的實務差距包括IEC體系安全及EMC證據、在目標網絡要求時從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口、DEWA或當地公用事業併網驗收，以及聯網充電樁的OCPP後台互操作。截至2026年6月13日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的阿聯酋強制認證規則，因此出口商應將MoIAT / ESMA合格評定視為取決於適用範圍，並核驗具體HS編碼、電氣產品類別和各酋長國項目審批路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
